roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DA MTR FILING/X:PEOPLE FILED MOTION TO REVOKE/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD//X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:ALEXANDRIA CARL//WIAMTR/M09/TBH:19004357/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/CONTD:TS DA MTR/DOP/

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 5 D/CTS  5/SA4  LEVI STORE AT 525 CASTRO SREET, SF/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/DEF IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THEDULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT  01-29-18/CONTD MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/X  RESTITUTION SHALL BE ASSESSEON BOTH COUNTS AND ANY OUTSTANDING RESTITUTION FROM CASE #16019273 IS TRSFERRED TO PROBATION IN THIS CASE VIA HARVEY WAIVER,/DOPU  IF THERE IS NOOBJECTION TO THE RESTITUTION AMOUNT/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA 40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL  PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, 490,2PC, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 01-29-18/987,2/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT FOUR TIME PER WEEK IN PERSON/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/CTORD:PROBATION IN #17017418 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:APD RESTITUTION RPT/DAWT/X:THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION RE RESTITUTION/
